title: Ironman in Nice | Mas du Chanoine
description: Ironman in Nice: French Riviera event near our guesthouse.
paragraphs: The Ironman event is a triathlon where athletes swim 3.8 km, bike 180 km and run a marathon of 42.2 km. The cycling race passes near our guesthouse between Vence and Tourrettes-sur-Loup. The race brings together professionals and amateurs. Spectators can support and cheer athletes throughout the courses.
